mission.title: opentofu: Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible with `mock_provider` in test configurations
mission.description: Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible with `mock_provider` in test configurations. This issue affects 21+ users.

steps.title: Identify the issue symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your OpenTofu configuration:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible…
steps.description:
This is just a few tweaks to the program that updates https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1496 each day.

The main motivation here is that we now use pull requests rather than issues to represent RFCs that have not yet been approved, and so the ranking of issues labeled "rfc" was misleading
```hcl
resource "aws_s3_bucket" "this" {
  for_each = toset(var.regions)
  bucket = "rp-test-abc-${each.value}"
  provider = aws.by_region[each.value]
}
```

steps.title: Upgrade OpenTofu to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade OpenTofu:
```bash
# Using Homebrew
brew upgrade opentofu

# Or download the latest release
# See https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
tofu version
```

steps.title: Confirm Provider configurations with `for_each` are not… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by running:
```bash
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the original error no longer occurs.

resolution.summary:
This is just a few tweaks to the program that updates https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1496 each day.

The main motivation here is that we now use pull requests rather than issues to represent RFCs that have not yet been approved, and so the ranking of issues labeled "rfc" was misleading to include.

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
